content.problemStatement:
Take marks of 5 subjects and calculate the average. Based on the average, assign a grade:


Average - Grade

90-100  -   A
75-89   -   B
60-74   -   C
40-59   -   D
Below 40 - F



Input Format
A line of 5 integers separated by space (each between 0 to 100)



Output Format

First line of output contains average (rounded to 2 decimal places)
Second line of output contains Grade
